synthesized_rules.title: Always prefer high-durability core lines
synthesized_rules.why: These lines repeatedly survive in high-recall and hybrid modes.
synthesized_rules.action: Promote preference/fact/project lines with strong durability and centrality into the default retained set.

synthesized_rules.title: Protect phrase-saving situational lines
synthesized_rules.why: These lines help recover expected phrases even when compression is active.
synthesized_rules.action: Allow a small budget for query-relevant situational lines when they restore missed expected phrases.

synthesized_rules.title: Compress costly lines unless they save recall
synthesized_rules.why: These lines consume many bytes and often drive negative context reduction.
synthesized_rules.action: Only keep costly lines when they materially improve expected-phrase coverage or central project state.
